_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of tasking processes for organic and subordinate collection assets.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model inventory management practices, including model tiering by materiality and complexity, risk classification, lifecycle tracking from development through retirement, and the documentation standards required at each stage.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.444), RC-T-006 (RC, cosine: 0.432).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.457). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [assets, collection, organic, processes, subordinate, tasking] vs WIDAI-only terms [classification, complexity, development, documentation, inventory, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.895, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.035 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of tasking processes for organic and subordinate collection assets." and "Knowledge of model inventory management practices, including model tiering by ma" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.481 ≈ STS 0.457 (gap 0.024). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.8%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [assets, collection, organic, processes, subordinate, tasking]. WIDAI-only: [classification, complexity, development, documentation, inventory, lifecycle].
